activities_projects.title: Main Characters Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters in the story
steps: Read the lesson carefully
List the names of the main characters
Write one line about each character

activities_projects.title: Character Sketch of Ausable
steps: Read the description of Ausable
Write 4–5 lines about his appearance and nature

activities_projects.title: Who is Fowler?
activities_projects.objective: Understand Fowler’s role in the story
steps: Identify who Fowler is
Write 3–4 sentences describing his expectations and reactions

activities_projects.title: Entry of Max
activities_projects.objective: Understand how Max enters the story
steps: Read the scene where Max appears
Write how his entry creates suspense

activities_projects.title: The Balcony Trick
steps: Read the explanation about the balcony
Write 3–4 lines explaining the trick

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the flow of the story
steps: List four important events
Arrange them in correct order

activities_projects.title: Presence of Mind
activities_projects.objective: Understand the theme of presence of mind
steps: Identify how Ausable shows presence of mind
Write 3 points from the story

activities_projects.title: New Vocabulary
steps: Choose five new words from the lesson
Write their meanings

activities_projects.title: Title Justification
activities_projects.objective: Understand the relevance of the title
steps: Think about the title
Write 3–4 sentences justifying it

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Application
activities_projects.objective: Relate the story to real-life situations
steps: Think of a situation requiring presence of mind
Write 3–4 sentences relating it to the story
